stories.headline: Peter Safran Still "Confident" In DCU Strategy After 'Supergirl' B.O. - Deadline
stories.summary: Although 'Supergirl' has failed to soar with its opening weekend, the DCU still has some tricks in store for moviegoers.

stories.headline: Noah Kahan begs fans to stop pooping in their pants during his concerts: 'Dear god just go to the bathroom' - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: Noah Kahan has a friendly reminder for all concertgoers: Bathrooms do exist and pooping in your pants is, uh, pretty unacceptable.

stories.headline: Body of newborn baby found in portable restroom at Electric Forest festival campground - WWMT
stories.summary: A festival worker found the body of a newborn in a restroom at Electric Forest on Sunday morning.

stories.headline: Kate Gosselin ignores drama surrounding son Collin's upcoming tell-all about childhood — talks rescue dog instead - Page Six
stories.summary: Collin has been taking public jabs at his mom ahead of his new memoir, “In the Shadow of Eight: Surviving the Reality of My Childhood,” coming out on Oct. 13.

stories.headline: Trump’s Empty Fair Gets Ultimate ‘Seek Shelter’ Humiliation - The Daily Beast
stories.summary: The president’s widely panned event can’t seem to catch a break.

stories.headline: Where to Watch BET Awards 2026 Live Online - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: With a number of free streaming options, here's how to catch the Druski-hosted awards show without cable.

stories.headline: ‘Michael’ Out-Boogies ‘Oppenheimer’ To Become Highest Grossing Biopic Of All-Time - Deadline
stories.summary: 'Michael' has surpassed 'Oppenheimer' to become the highest grossing biopic at the global box office with $977.4 million.

stories.headline: Harry Styles chokes on water, collapses on stage at London concert amid U.K. heat wave - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: Harry Styles caused some serious fan concern after lying down on stage at the end of his Friday night Wembley Stadium set.
